message:
fix(bd-3olo): resolve all clippy pedantic warnings

Fix 9 clippy pedantic warnings across test code:
- duration.rs: remove no-op `1 *` and fix digit grouping
- traffic.rs: use assert! instead of assert_eq! with bool literal
- renderer.rs: use Duration::from_millis(1) instead of from_micros(1000)
- trace.rs: use float abs comparison instead of assert_eq on f64
- auth.rs: construct unit struct directly, not via ::default()
- bidirectional.rs: rename _rx to rx (used later in test)
- proxy.rs: use float abs comparison for f64 assertions
- transform.rs: construct unit struct directly, not via ::default()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
